### Props

| Name               | Type      | Required | Default     | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ------------------ | --------- | -------- | ----------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `title`            | `string`  |          | `''`        | Card title text                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| `description`      | `string`  |          | `''`        | Description text, displayed with line-clamp truncation                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| `titleTooltip`     | `string`  |          | `''`        | Tooltip text for the title. If not set, falls back to description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| `icon`             | `object   | func`    |             | `null`                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         | Icon component (e.g., imported MDI icon). Rendered via &lt;component :is&gt; |
| `iconSize`         | `number`  |          | `20`        | Icon size in pixels                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| `labels`           | `array`   |          | `[]`        | Array of badge/label objects displayed inline with the title. Each entry: \{ text: string, variant?: string \} Variant maps to CnStatusBadge variants: 'default'\|'primary'\|'success'\|'warning'\|'error'\|'info' For labels with icons, use the #labels slot override and render CnStatusBadge manually with its #icon slot. |
| `stats`            | `array`   |          | `[]`        | Array of stat rows displayed as label:value pairs. Each entry: \{ label: string, value: string\|number \}                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `descriptionLines` | `number`  |          | `3`         | Maximum lines for description truncation (CSS line-clamp)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| `active`           | `boolean` |          | `false`     | Whether the card is in an active/highlighted state                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| `activeVariant`    | `string`  |          | `'success'` | Color variant for the active state border and background. Maps to Nextcloud CSS variables.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| `clickable`        | `boolean` |          | `false`     | Whether the card is clickable (adds hover effect and cursor pointer)                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| `footerLinks`      | `array`   |          | `[]`        | Array of footer link objects. Each entry: \{ url: string, label?: string \} Links are rendered as clickable anchors. Use the #footer-link-icon-\{index\} slot to add an icon before a specific link.                                                                                                                           |
| `tags`             | `array`   |          | `[]`        | Array of tag items for the footer. Accepts either strings or objects. String entries are converted to \{ text: string, variant: 'default' \}. Object entries: \{ text: string, variant?: string \}                                                                                                                             |

| `click` | —       |             |
